meta.purpose: Machine-readable API surface, dependency graph, and agentic action routing for the entire PwShGUI workspace. Load this single file to digest every callable function, every module, and every tracking item without scanning 60+ files.

agenticAPI.$purpose: Dedicated agentic action routing, coverage tracking, and agent interaction log interface. Agents read this section to resolve any action key to its handler in one lookup, determine test coverage, and log their invocations for audit.

coverageMap.$purpose: Quick lookup: which action domains have test coverage and which are untested.

callChains.$purpose: Multi-step workflows with preconditions. Agents execute these sequences atomically.

scanAndTriageBugs.description: Run all 6 bug vectors, push results into pipeline, then regenerate the todo bundle.

buildAndPackage.description: Version bump, build manifest, export zip package.

fullCronCycle.description: Execute all scheduled jobs, process bugs, update pipeline health.

secureVaultAccess.description: Unlock vault, read a secret, re-lock. Ensures vault is never left open.

integrityAudit.description: Build baseline, scan for changes, log findings.

outlinePromotion.description: Promote outline schema from v0 to v1 after Chief approval.

agentTrackingInterface.$purpose: Schema and paths for agents to log their invocations for audit, replay, and performance analysis.

logSchema.errorMessage: string|null: error details if result != success
logSchema.pipelineItemId: string|null: linked pipeline/bug/todo ID if applicable
logSchema.callChain: string|null: callChain name if part of a workflow sequence

registrationEndpoint.description: Call this function to persist an agent interaction record

dependencyGraph.$purpose: Module-level import edges. Agents use this to understand boot order and cascading impacts.
